name: worktree-habit
description: Worktree-first workflow guidance for avoiding source edits directly on main.

interface.shortDescription: Use Git worktrees before editing on main.
interface.longDescription: Worktree Habit provides reusable guidance for checking the current branch before code changes, creating an in-repo Git worktree from main, and continuing work from that worktree in the same session.
defaultPrompt: Use a worktree before editing on main.
Set up a feature worktree for this change.
Check whether this task needs a worktree.
